The polynomial equation is $ -2t^3 + 15t^2 + 36t + 100 = 10 $. Subtract 10 from both sides to get $ -2t^3 + 15t^2 + 36t + 90 = 0 $. This is a cubic equation. To solve it, we can try factoring or using numerical methods. However, since it is not easily factorable, we can approximate the solution using a graphing calculator or numerical methods like Newton-Raphson. The solution to this equation will give the time $ t $ in days when the number of views reaches exactly 1,000.  

The range of days $ t $ for which $ V(t) \geq 7 $ is determined by solving the inequality $ -2t^3 + 15t^2 + 36t + 100 \geq 7 $. This involves finding the values of $ t $ where the polynomial is greater than or equal to 7. The solution to this inequality will give the range of days when the number of views is at least 700.  

The entire response should end with the word "end".
